documentation.text:
@title ConsensusDispute
 @dev Manages the 7-node equal-weight consensus voting for trade disputes
      triggered by ENTRY_REJECTED from Custom & Tax Authority.
 ── 7 Voting Nodes (1 vote each) ────────────────────────────────────────────
   1. Importer
   2. Exporter
   3. Inspector
   4. Custom & Tax Authority
   5. Insurance Node
   6. Issuing Bank (Importer Bank)
   7. Advising Bank (Exporter Bank)
   Fixed Threshold = 4 votes to pass (revert the transaction)
   Voting Window   = 24 hours from dispute activation
 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 ── Inspector Field Decision ────────────────────────────────────────────────
   The Inspector submits a structured decision:
     - decision: true (yes) / false (no)
     - cargoStatus: 0 = safe, 1 = damaged, 2 = fake_documents
   If cargo is damaged → Exporter can file insurance claim
 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 ── Resolution ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   Votes >= 4 for REVERT  → TRADE_REVERTED_BY_CONSENSUS (escrow → importer)
   Votes < 4 for REVERT   → DISPUTE_RESOLVED_NO_REVERT (no revert)
   If cargo damaged        → CLAIM_PAYOUT_APPROVED (insurance payout)
 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

@title DocumentVerification
 @dev Handles shipping (Bill of Lading) and the unified Custom & Tax Authority flow.
 ── Document Flow ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1. Shipping company issues Bill of Lading → GOODS_SHIPPED
  2. Custom & Tax Authority evaluates goods (3 decisions):
     Decision 0 (CLEAR)  → CUSTOMS_CLEARED, no tax
     Decision 1 (FLAGS)  → CUSTOMS_FLAGGED, taxAmount set
     Decision 2 (REJECT) → ENTRY_REJECTED, triggers voting
  3. [If FLAGGED] Exporter pays tax externally; Custom & Tax Authority
     calls payTaxAndRelease() → CUSTOMS_CLEARED
  4. [If REJECTED] ConsensusDispute handles 7-node voting
 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

@title LetterOfCredit
 @dev Manages the full LoC lifecycle:
      1. Importer bank uploads LoC document → stores IPFS hash on-chain → LOC_UPLOADED
      2. Exporter bank approves the LoC → LOC_APPROVED
      3. Importer bank locks funds in escrow → FUNDS_LOCKED
 ── IPFS Document Flow ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Backend uploads file → Pinata IPFS → returns CID
  Importer bank calls uploadLocDocument(tradeId, CID) → CID stored on-chain
  Anyone can read locDocHash[tradeId] and retrieve the document via IPFS gateway
 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

@title PaymentSettlement
 @dev Manages escrow deposits, payment authorization, settlement confirmation,
      refunds on dispute revert, and insurance payouts for damaged cargo.
 ── Payment Flow ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1. After CUSTOMS_CLEARED + GOODS_RECEIVED:
     Importer bank calls authorizePayment(tradeId) → PAYMENT_AUTHORIZED
  2. Off-chain: Bank-to-bank SWIFT/SEPA settlement happens.
  3. Exporter bank confirms receipt of funds:
     confirmSettlement(tradeId) → SETTLEMENT_CONFIRMED → COMPLETED
  4. [If TRADE_REVERTED_BY_CONSENSUS]:
     refundImporter(tradeId) → returns escrow funds to Importer Bank
  5. [If CLAIM_PAYOUT_APPROVED]:
     payoutInsurance(tradeId) → pays escrowed funds to Exporter (insurance claim)
 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

@title TradeRegistry
 @dev Central registry for all trades. Manages participants, state machine,
      and authorization of satellite contracts (LoC, DocVerification, Payment, Consensus).
 ── State Machine ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  OFFER_ACCEPTED  → TRADE_INITIATED (both parties on-chain confirm)
  TRADE_INITIATED → LOC_INITIATED   (importer selects bank)
  LOC_INITIATED   → LOC_UPLOADED    (importer bank uploads doc + IPFS hash)
  LOC_UPLOADED    → LOC_APPROVED    (exporter bank approves)
  LOC_APPROVED    → FUNDS_LOCKED    (importer bank locks funds)
  FUNDS_LOCKED    → SHIPPING_ASSIGNED (importer assigns shipping)
  SHIPPING_ASSIGNED → GOODS_SHIPPED (shipping company issues BoL)
  GOODS_SHIPPED   → CUSTOMS_CLEARED (customs decision: 0 = clear)
  GOODS_SHIPPED   → CUSTOMS_FLAGGED (customs decision: 1 = flags / tax)
  GOODS_SHIPPED   → ENTRY_REJECTED  (customs decision: 2 = rejected)
  CUSTOMS_FLAGGED → CUSTOMS_CLEARED (exporter pays tax, customs releases)
  ENTRY_REJECTED  → VOTING_ACTIVE   (7-node voting starts, 24hr timer)
  VOTING_ACTIVE   → TRADE_REVERTED_BY_CONSENSUS (votes >= 4)
  VOTING_ACTIVE   → DISPUTE_RESOLVED_NO_REVERT  (votes < 4)
  CUSTOMS_CLEARED → GOODS_RECEIVED  (importer confirms receipt)
  GOODS_RECEIVED  → PAYMENT_AUTHORIZED (importer bank authorizes)
  PAYMENT_AUTHORIZED → SETTLEMENT_CONFIRMED (exporter bank confirms)
  SETTLEMENT_CONFIRMED → COMPLETED
 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

@notice Importer or exporter confirms the final trade agreement.
         When both confirm, status advances to TRADE_INITIATED.
@notice Importer requests a Letter of Credit → LOC_INITIATED.
@notice Assign a shipping company to the trade (importer, after funds locked).
@notice Assign an advising bank (exporter bank) to the trade.

@notice Importer signals that goods have been received perfectly.
         Transitions from CUSTOMS_CLEARED → GOODS_RECEIVED.
@notice Authorize or de-authorize a satellite contract to call updateStatus.
@notice Update trade status. Only callable by authorized satellite contracts or owner.
@notice Set the 24-hour voting deadline on a trade. Called by ConsensusDispute.
@notice Importer's bank triggers a revert if the shipping deadline is breached.
@notice Issuing Bank or Importer triggers revert if clearance deadline is breached (SLA 2).
@notice Any participant can raise a dispute, halting the trade.
@notice Read a trade record.

the 7-node equal-weight consensus voting for trade disputes      triggered by ENTRY_REJECTED from Custom & Tax Authority. \u2500\u2500 7 Voting Nodes (1 vote each) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500   1. Importer   2. Exporter   3. Inspector   4. Custom & Tax Authority   5. Insurance Node   6. Issuing Bank (Importer Bank)   7. Advising Bank (Exporter Bank)   Fixed Threshold = 4 votes to pass (revert the transaction)   Voting Window   = 24 hours from dispute activation \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 \u2500\u2500 Inspector Field Decision \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500   The Inspector submits a structured decision:     - decision: true (yes) / false (no)     - cargoStatus: 0 = safe, 1 = damaged, 2 = fake_documents   If cargo is damaged \u2192 Exporter can file insurance claim \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 \u2500\u2500 Resolution \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500   Votes >= 4 for REVERT  \u2192 TRADE_REVERTED_BY_CONSENSUS (escrow \u2192 importer)   Votes < 4 for REVERT   \u2192 DISPUTE_RESOLVED_NO_REVERT (no revert)   If cargo damaged        \u2192 CLAIM_PAYOUT_APPROVED (insurance payout) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500","kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"ConsensusDispute","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"activateVoting(uint256,string)":{"notice":"Activate voting after ENTRY_REJECTED. shipping (Bill of Lading) and the unified Custom & Tax Authority flow. \u2500\u2500 Document Flow \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500  1. Shipping company issues Bill of Lading \u2192 GOODS_SHIPPED  2. Custom & Tax Authority evaluates goods (3 decisions):     Decision 0 (CLEAR)  \u2192 CUSTOMS_CLEARED, no tax     Decision 1 (FLAGS)  \u2192 CUSTOMS_FLAGGED, taxAmount set     Decision 2 (REJECT) \u2192 ENTRY_REJECTED, triggers voting  3. [If FLAGGED] Exporter pays tax externally; Custom & Tax Authority     calls payTaxAndRelease() \u2192 CUSTOMS_CLEARED  4. [If REJECTED] ConsensusDispute handles 7-node voting \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500","kind":"dev","methods":{"verifyAsCustoms(uint256,uint8,uint256,string)":{"params":{"certIpfsHash":"Optional: IPFS CID of customs certificate","decision":"0: Clear, 1: Flags (add tax), 2: Entry Rejection","taxAmount":"Tax amount in wei (only relevant for decision 1)","tradeId":"On-chain trade ID"}}},"title":"DocumentVerification","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"getBolIpfsHash(uint256)":{"notice":"Read just the IPFS hash of the Bill of Lading for a trade."},"getVerification(uint256)":{"notice":"Read the full verification state for a trade."},"issueBillOfLading(uint256,string)":{"notice":"Shipping company accepts goods and issues the Bill of Lading.         Stores BoL IPFS CID on-chain \u2192 GOODS_SHIPPED."},"payTaxAndRelease(uint256)":{"notice":"Custom & Tax Authority confirms that the Exporter has paid the required         tax externally and releases the goods \u2192 CUSTOMS_CLEARED. TradeRegistry","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"details":"Manages escrow deposits, payment authorization, settlement confirmation,      refunds on dispute revert, and insurance payouts for damaged cargo. \u2500\u2500 Payment Flow \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500  1. After CUSTOMS_CLEARED + GOODS_RECEIVED:     Importer bank calls authorizePayment(tradeId) \u2192 PAYMENT_AUTHORIZED  2. Off-chain: Bank-to-bank SWIFT/SEPA settlement happens.  3. Exporter bank confirms receipt of funds:     confirmSettlement(tradeId) \u2192 SETTLEMENT_CONFIRMED \u2192 COMPLETED  4. [If TRADE_REVERTED_BY_CONSENSUS]:     refundImporter(tradeId) \u2192 returns escrow funds to Importer Bank  5. [If CLAIM_PAYOUT_APPROVED]:     payoutInsurance(tradeId) \u2192 pays escrowed funds to Exporter (insurance claim) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500","kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"PaymentSettlement","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"authorizePayment(uint256)":{"notice":"Importer bank authorizes payment after goods received.         Transitions trade to PAYMENT_AUTHORIZED."},"confirmSettlement(uint256)":{"notice":"Exporter bank confirms off-chain settlement completed.         Transitions trade to SETTLEMENT_CONFIRMED \u2192 COMPLETED."},"depositEscrow(uint256)":{"notice":"Importer's Bank deposits the trade amount into the contract vault (Escrow)."},"getSettlement(uint256)":{"notice":"Read the settlement record for a trade."},"payoutInsurance(uint256)":{"notice":"Payout insurance to Exporter if consensus approves insurance claim. \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500  OFFER_ACCEPTED  \u2192 TRADE_INITIATED (both parties on-chain confirm)  TRADE_INITIATED \u2192 LOC_INITIATED   (importer selects bank)  LOC_INITIATED   \u2192 LOC_UPLOADED    (importer bank uploads doc + IPFS hash)  LOC_UPLOADED    \u2192 LOC_APPROVED    (exporter bank approves)  LOC_APPROVED    \u2192 FUNDS_LOCKED    (importer bank locks funds)  FUNDS_LOCKED    \u2192 SHIPPING_ASSIGNED (importer assigns shipping)  SHIPPING_ASSIGNED \u2192 GOODS_SHIPPED (shipping company issues BoL)  GOODS_SHIPPED   \u2192 CUSTOMS_CLEARED (customs decision: 0 = clear)  GOODS_SHIPPED   \u2192 CUSTOMS_FLAGGED (customs decision: 1 = flags / tax)  GOODS_SHIPPED   \u2192 ENTRY_REJECTED  (customs decision: 2 = rejected)  CUSTOMS_FLAGGED \u2192 CUSTOMS_CLEARED (exporter pays tax, customs releases)  ENTRY_REJECTED  \u2192 VOTING_ACTIVE   (7-node voting starts, 24hr timer)  VOTING_ACTIVE   \u2192 TRADE_REVERTED_BY_CONSENSUS (votes >= 4)  VOTING_ACTIVE   \u2192 DISPUTE_RESOLVED_NO_REVERT  (votes < 4)  CUSTOMS_CLEARED \u2192 GOODS_RECEIVED  (importer confirms receipt)  GOODS_RECEIVED  \u2192 PAYMENT_AUTHORIZED (importer bank authorizes)  PAYMENT_AUTHORIZED \u2192 SETTLEMENT_CONFIRMED (exporter bank confirms)  SETTLEMENT_CONFIRMED \u2192 COMPLETED
